_note: Gate runs per-slide — invoke eval-run.sh once per PNG (one image per invocation). Default spec assumes 4:5 (1080×1350). For 1:1 (1080×1080) runs, layer a brand-overrides/<slug>/acceptance.json that overrides canvas_1080x1350 (w/h) and slide_not_blank (crop). Perceptual checks return PENDING — resolve with a vision pass (c-vision-qa) before delivery. Strict, recipe-owned spec read by c-eval-runner.

checks.desc: (a) No text overflows the card edge — all headlines, body copy, and eyebrows are fully visible within the slide bounds with no truncation or overflow.
(b) Text-to-background contrast is legible — body copy reads clearly against the card surface; no dark-on-dark or light-on-light pairing anywhere on the slide.
(c) Margin rhythm matches the template — padding on all four sides is consistent with the recipe's spacing convention; no element is flush to the canvas edge.
(d) Colors are on-brand — no generic placeholder colors (e.g. #3b82f6, #333, stock grey); accent, ink, and card-surface values match the brand palette injected into the CSS vars in Step 3.

(e) Visual hierarchy is premium — clear size/weight progression (heading > subhead > body) with real layout structure (step list, stat callout, diagram, window mock, or CTA block); not a bare title on a plain background.
